Home›Partnerships›White-Label Programs› Threat Hunting
White-Label Partnership

White-Label
Threat Hunting

Deliver world-class threat hunting under your own brand. We operate as your invisible back-office — your clients see your name, your pricing, your relationship.

Your Brand. Our Expertise.

Our white-label threat hunting program allows MSPs, IT consulting firms, staffing agencies, and other professional services organizations to offer threat hunting to their clients without building the capability in-house. We operate entirely behind the scenes — your clients never know we exist unless you choose to disclose the arrangement.

Who This Program Is For

White-label partners are typically: Enterprises and government contractors needing proactive adversary discovery across their environment.

  • Managed service providers (MSPs) expanding their security service catalog
  • IT consulting firms that win contracts requiring threat hunting delivery
  • Security consulting companies without specialized in-house capability
  • Staffing and professional services firms with cybersecurity clients
  • Law firms and advisory practices needing technical delivery capacity
  • Regional IT companies serving enterprise and mid-market clients

What We Deliver Under Your Brand

All work product, reports, communication, and deliverables are prepared under your brand identity. We provide:

  • All deliverables formatted with your logo, branding, and contact information
  • Client-facing communications drafted from your company's perspective
  • Analyst and consultant availability for client briefings using your company identity
  • White-labeled reports, technical documentation, and executive summaries
  • Slack/Teams/email communication using your preferred channels
  • Discretion and confidentiality — your client relationship is always yours

Partner Economics

White-label partners set their own client pricing. We quote you our wholesale rate, and the margin between your client price and our wholesale is yours to keep. Typical partner margins are 20–35%.

  • Wholesale pricing: Discounted from our standard client rates
  • Your retail price: Set at your discretion — we never see or influence it
  • Typical margin: 20–35% above our wholesale rate
  • Billing: You bill your client, we invoice you — simple two-party arrangement
  • Volume discounts: Available for partners committing to monthly minimums
  • No setup fees: Partner program enrollment is free

Operating Model

White-label engagements follow a defined operating model designed to protect your client relationship while ensuring delivery quality.

  1. You scope and price the engagement with your client — we support with technical scoping guidance
  2. You execute a services agreement with your client under your company name
  3. You execute a white-label services agreement with us covering the same scope
  4. We deliver the work — all client artifacts carry your branding
  5. You own the client relationship, the invoicing, and all ongoing account management
  6. We invoice you at pre-agreed wholesale rates on NET-30 terms

Quality Assurance

Every white-label engagement carries the same quality standards as our direct client work. Your clients receive senior practitioner attention — not overflow or junior staff. Our reputation as your invisible partner is only as strong as the quality we deliver.

Program Details

  • Typical margin: 20–35%
  • You set client pricing
  • Billing: NET-30
  • Deliverables: Your brand
  • NDA included
  • No setup fees

Partner Types

  • MSPs & MSSPs
  • IT Consulting Firms
  • Security Companies
  • Staffing Agencies
  • Law Firms
  • Advisory Practices

Start White-Labeling

Schedule a partner call. We'll discuss your client base, wholesale pricing, and operating agreement — typically finalized within 5 business days.
